posts.title: Hello World
posts.text: Welcome to Hexo! This is your very first post. Check documentation for more info. If you get any problems when using Hexo, you can find the answer in troubleshooting or you can ask me on GitHub. Quick StartCreate a new post1$ hexo new "My New Post" More info: Writing Run server1$ hexo server More info: Server Generate static files1$ hexo generate More info: Generating Deploy to remote sites1$ hexo deploy More info: Deployment

pages.text: Tianao Yang (杨天傲)Senior Undergraduate Student Research Internship in Tsinghua Storage Research Group Department of Computer Science and Technology, Tsinghua University Room 8-207, East Main Building, Tsinghua University, Beijing, China Email: yta20@mails.tsinghua.edu.cn About MEHi, my name is Tianao Yang (杨天傲). I’m a fourth-year undergraduate student in the Department of Computer Science and Technology, Tsinghua University. I’ll be a Ph.D. student in 2024 in Tsinghua Storage Research Group, advised by Prof. Youyou Lu and Prof. Jiwu Shu. My research interests include storage system for deep learning, programmable network devices and human computer interaction. I prefer writing in Chinese rather than English, T.T. Publications Understanding In-Situ Programming for Smart Home Automation.Liu, X., Shi, Y., Yu, C., Gao, C., Yang, T., Liang, C., & Shi, Y.Proceedings of the ACM on Interactive, Mobile, Wearable and Ubiquitous Technologies (IMWUT’23),2023 EducationPh.D. start in 2024Department of Computer Science and Technology, Tsinghua University B.Eng. 2020 - presentDepartment of Computer Science and Technology, Tsinghua University
Feel Free to Contact Me via WeChat…
